tavily.raw: {"query":"Oppenheimer Holdings Q1 2026 financial results earnings report","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/oppenheimer-holdings-inc-reports-first-quarter-2026-earnings-302759480.html","title":"Oppenheimer Holdings Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings","content":"(NYSE: OPY) (the \"Company\" or \"Firm\") today reported a net loss of $20.6 million or $(1.93) per share (basic and diluted) for the first quarter of 2026, compared with net income of $30.7 million or $2.93 basic earnings per share for the first quarter of 2025. First quarter 2026 results were adversely affected by a $70 million (pre-tax) legal accrual for the settlement of the \"cash sweep\" program litigation announced on April 24, 2026 and a $22.3 million (pre-tax) expense associated with a recurring liability-based employee compensation award program for financial advisors that is tied to our stock price, which increased by $16.90 per Class A share during the quarter (from $72.29 to $89.19). Adjusted net income(a), a non-GAAP measure which excludes the impact of these items, was $47.5 million or $4.46 adjusted basic earnings per share for the first quarter of 2026, compared with adjusted net income of $28.6 million or $2.74 adjusted basic earnings per share for the first quarter of 2025.","score":0.97305965,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.marketbeat.com/stocks/NYSE/OPY/earnings","title":"Oppenheimer (OPY) Earnings Date and Reports 2026","content":"Oppenheimer issued Q1 2026 earnings on May 1, 2026, reporting an EPS of $4.21. Quarterly revenue was reported to be $445.10 million.","score":0.9703554,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/OPY/8-k-oppenheimer-holdings-inc-reports-material-event-d9307266abb4.html","title":"Oppenheimer 2026 meeting backs board, notes Q1 loss | OPY 8-K Filing","content":"**Oppenheimer Holdings Inc.** reported that Class B stockholders approved all five proposals at the 2026 annual meeting, including electing nine directors, ratifying Deloitte & Touche LLP as auditor, endorsing executive pay, selecting a three‑year say‑on‑pay frequency, and adopting an amended and restated certificate of incorporation. The company highlighted record 2025 results, with revenue of $1.64 billion, net income of $148.4 million and basic EPS of $14.13, driven by strong wealth management and investment banking performance. For Q1 2026, revenue rose to $445.1 million but Oppenheimer recorded a net loss of $20.6 million and basic EPS of $(1.93), largely reflecting a $70 million accrual for settlement of “cash sweep” class action litigation and a $22.3 million stock appreciation rights expense. On an adjusted non‑GAAP basis, Q1 2026 diluted EPS was $4.21, and the board increased the quarterly dividend to $0.20 per share. In Q1 2026, revenue increased 21.0% year over year to $445.1 million, but a net loss of $20.6 million stemmed from a $70 million class-action \"cash sweep\" settlement accrual and $22.3 million of stock appreciation rights expense.","score":0.9688356,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.oppenheimer.com/about-us/investor-relations","title":"Investor Relations","content":"Our Financial Professionals can advise you on all your wealth management needs. ## Contact Us.
